fields.label: Memory Scope
fields.help: Project = memories scoped to this workspace. Global = shared across all workspaces.

fields.label: Auto-save Important Facts
fields.help: Agent automatically saves important information to memory during conversations

fields.label: Search Memory on Session Start
fields.help: Agent searches memory for relevant context at the start of each conversation

fields.label: Retention Period
fields.help: Days before old memories are cleaned up. 0 = keep forever.

fields.label: Auto-compact Long Conversations
fields.help: Automatically summarize and compact conversations that exceed the context window

fields.label: Compact After
fields.help: Number of messages before triggering compaction

fields.label: What to Remember
fields.placeholder:
What should this agent prioritize saving to memory?
e.g., Save key decisions and their reasoning. Save user preferences. Save project milestones. Don't save casual greetings.
fields.help: Guide what the agent considers worth remembering
